calendar.matters:
Petition To Find Asset Is Property Of The Trust And To Modify The Trust Due To Changed Circumstances
Off Calendar Aug-24-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maureen McFadden for (petitioner) Ruben Enriquez.

The Court stated that this petition seeks to confirm real property and that the Court has no issue with this, that the other issue is that eliminating Trust B raises more questions, that it understands that there are no objections, that the petitioner is the person who most stands to lose, that it protects the inheritance of the beneficiaries and that the petition could end up with nothing. Ms. McFadden confirmed that the petitioner understands this, that she can have him submit a declaration if necessary, that he is the caregiver for his mother and that the risk is slight to none. The Court stated that it will grant the petition and that the petitioner is pushing for something that only he can be hurt by. The Court granted the petition to find asset is property of the trust and to modify the trust due to changed circumstances (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)
